title: fix(libpod): runtime: check if store is nil
body: Fixes a nil reference exception if libpod is started without storage (configureStorage is not called) and GetSecretsStorageDir is called.

comments.body:

While that segfault can happen because of accessing store, which is nil,

I don't think this PR is quite ready to merge yet, since there needs to be a wider set of changes to make it actually work properly when needsUserNs is true.
